title: Getting Started with Codex CLI: Code Reading and Bug Fixing
description: Learn how to install and use OpenAI's Codex CLI to read codebases, understand unfamiliar code, and fix bugs — all from the terminal.

resources.title: Codex CLI Official Repository
resources.description: Installation guide, configuration options, and usage examples for Codex CLI

resources.title: OpenAI API Documentation
resources.description: API key setup and model configuration for Codex CLI

resources.title: Install Codex CLI and review a file
resources.description: Install Codex CLI via npm and run your first code review on an existing file

resources.title: Codex CLI Getting Started Tutorial
resources.search_keyword: Codex CLI OpenAI getting started tutorial 2026

quiz.question: What is the main purpose of Codex CLI?
options: Read, analyze, and fix code from the terminal
quiz.explanation: Codex CLI is designed for code understanding, review, refactoring, and bug fixing workflows in the terminal.

quiz.question: Which package manager command installs Codex CLI globally in this lesson?
quiz.explanation: This lesson uses the npm package `@openai/codex` and installs it globally with `npm install -g`.

quiz.question: What is a good first task after installation?
quiz.explanation: Starting with one small file makes it easier to verify the CLI is installed correctly and understand the review output.

evaluation.prompt: Paste your Codex CLI output, install log, or review result here and AI will check whether you are on the right track.
evaluation.context: This lesson is about getting Codex CLI installed and using it to review one small file successfully from the terminal.
successCriteria: The learner can run a review command
The output shows usable findings or analysis
commonMistakes: CLI not installed globally or not found in PATH
API key not configured before first run
Trying to review too large a codebase on the first attempt

practicePrompts.label: Install Codex CLI
practicePrompts.instruction: Guide the AI to install Codex CLI.
practicePrompts.prompt: How do I install OpenAI's Codex CLI using npm?
practicePrompts.followUp: Try configuring your API key for Codex CLI.

practicePrompts.label: Run Code Review
practicePrompts.instruction: Ask the AI to help you review code.
practicePrompts.prompt: Can you show me how to run a code review on a specific file using Codex CLI?
practicePrompts.followUp: Experiment with reviewing a different file or codebase.

practicePrompts.label: Fix a Bug
practicePrompts.instruction: Get help in fixing a code bug.
practicePrompts.prompt: What steps should I take to fix a bug in my code using Codex CLI?
practicePrompts.followUp: Try identifying another bug in a different code snippet.
